response.justification: Bogdan is a highly accomplished engineer with 20 years of experience and demonstrated ability to architect large-scale systems (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby, top-10 apps at WatchUp). However, the resume shows no direct experience building experimentation platforms, metrics infrastructure, or working with A/B testing and feature flagging systems—core to this Principal role. His recent work includes AI-agent infrastructure, which is positive, but the critical gap in growth/experimentation domain expertise creates significant uncertainty about readiness for this specialized position.
strengths: Staff-level technical leadership across multiple companies with proven ability to design systems enabling multiple teams
Extensive production experience at scale with high-throughput systems (millions of requests/second, millions of mails annually) and proven track record shipping impactful products
Deep programming language expertise across all required languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, C#, C++) plus emerging AI tool familiarity (MCP, agents) relevant to role
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing systems, or feature flagging infrastructure—the core domain expertise required for this Principal role
Absence of metrics, telemetry, or data analysis background; no evidence of working with data science teams on experimental design or statistical analysis
Limited evidence of multi-region distributed systems or rollout risk management and bias detection experience required by preferred qualifications

key_factors.factor: Staff-level seniority and systems architecture skills
Recent AI tools and emerging infrastructure experience
